modules.sql: SELECT oe.fee_waived, COUNT(*) AS event_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oe.fee_amount IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE oe.fee_amount END), 2) AS total_fees, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN oe.fee_amount IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE oe.fee_amount END), 2) AS avg_fee, oe.as_of FROM overdraft_events oe GROUP BY oe.fee_waived, oe.as_of ORDER BY oe.fee_waived
